element.hint: Corner radius for tiles in pixels
element.label: Tile Corner Radius
element.name: tile_radius

element.hint: Font size for tile labels in pixels
element.label: Label Font Size
element.name: label_font_size

element.hint: Layout algorithm: squarify, binary, slice, dice
element.label: Tiling Method
element.name: tiling_method

element.hint: Width of the border around each tile in pixels
element.label: Tile Border Width
element.name: tile_border_width
